title: (Bullish Signal) UPLD, Stochastic Oscillator left the oversold zone on March 25, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that UPLD's price trend could be reversing, and it may be an opportunity to buy the stock or explore call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 60 similar cases where UPLD's stochastic oscillator exited the oversold zone, and 54 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 90%. Current price $47.98 crossed the resistance line at $48.19 and is trading between $48.19 resistance and $46.58 support lines. Throughout the month of 02/23/21 - 03/25/21, the price experienced a -2% Downtrend. During the week of 03/18/21 - 03/25/21, the stock fell -1%.

https://preview.redd.it/1zn3v2c2lfp61.png?width=1529&format=png&auto=webp&s=e6d203d1243b9dc49964de13c475056e89ea1308

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The 50-day Moving Average for UPLD moved above the 200-day moving average on August 05, 2020. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +3.43% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where UPLD advanced for three days, in 281 of 346 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

UPLD may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 231 of 266 cases where UPLD Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 87%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/10189583-upland-software-s-upld-46-61-stochastic-oscillator-left-the-oversold-zone-on-march-25-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
